title: allmusic-modified-client
description: This is a fork mod version of allmusic client
body:
# Bamboo Music in Minecraft
Bamboo Music in Minecraft client-side mod.

Bamboo Music in Minecraft 客户端模组

This is a fork version of AllMusic Client.

本模组为AllMusic Client的fork版本

(Required on your server) Bamboo Music in Minecraft server-side Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/allmusic-localapi

(服务器需要安装) Bamboo Music in Minecraft 服务端插件下载地址：

https://modrinth.com/plugin/allmusic-localapi

Also work with AllMusic original server-side plugin.

与原 AllMusic 服务端插件同样兼容

# Features

This fork version tried to fix some errors like:
1. When a song is played in the middle of the game, the playback time of the song server is inconsistent with that of the client.

   歌曲播放中途加入游戏时，歌曲服务端播放的时间与客户端不一致的问题。

2. Can't stop playing music when leaving servers.
  
    退出服务器后歌曲还在播放的问题

3. Some URL can't play on the client like GitHub Page URL.

    一些歌曲无法被播放，比如来自 GitHub Page 的URL

# Licence
Same as the original
